data.title: REX Shares submits Solana and Ethereum staking ETF prospectus, expected to be listed in the US within weeks
data.description: Bloomberg analyst James Seyffart said on the X platform that REX Shares has submitted a prospectus for Solana and Ethereum collateralized ETFs, which are expected to be listed on the US market in the coming weeks. These funds are products under the 1940 Act and use a C-type corporate structure rather than the traditional 19b-4 process. "This may be a way to get some level of approval from the SEC." Seyffart pointed out that the ETF will obtain SOL and ETH spot exposure through a Cayman subsidiary, and said that "this is a series of clever legal and regulatory circumvention strategies used to bring these products to market." Seyffart also said: "Even if a more efficient structure emerges in the future, this may be the first way to go online."

data.title: Top French Soccer Club PSG Announces Bitcoin Accumulation One Day Before Champions League Final
data.description:

source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/30/top-french-soccer-club-psg-announces-bitcoin-accumulation-one-day-before-champions-league-final/

data.title: Meta shareholders reject Bitcoin treasury bid in landslide vote
data.description:
Meta Platforms shareholders rejected a measure that urged the company to add Bitcoin (BTC) to its $72 billion cash pile, voting 4. 98 billion shares against and 3. 92 million for at the May 30 annual meeting, as reports surfaced. Abstentions totaled 8
source: https://cryptoslate.com/meta-shareholders-reject-bitcoin-treasury-bid-in-landslide-vote/

data.title: Uniswap Rally Loading—Here’s Why The Next Move Could Be Explosive
data.description:
In a fresh post shared on X, crypto analyst First1Bitcoin drew attention to Uniswap’s (UNI) recent market behavior, noting that the token appears to be gaining strength following an extended period of sideways movement. According to the analyst, this prolonged accumulation phase may be setting the stage for a significant breakout. The chart, as highlighted in the post, is beginning to show encouraging signs of bullish pressure. With price tightening near key resistance levels, the conditions appear ripe for a potential upward surge, provided that buying momentum continues to build
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/uni/uniswap-next-explosive-move/
